name: Wolf Minerals
description: Wolf Minerals Limited was an Australian-based specialty metals company that focused on the exploration and development of tungsten and tin projects. Its primary asset was the Drakelands Mine, formerly known as the Hemerdon Project, located in Devon, United Kingdom. The company was listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: WLF) and the London Stock Exchange's Alternative Investment Market (AIM: WLFE). Wolf Minerals aimed to become a significant global producer of tungsten, a critical industrial metal, before entering administration in 2018 due to operational and financial challenges at its UK mining site.
